roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PROOF OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/DAWT/X: DEPUTY CONFIRMS DEFENDANT ISCOMPLIANT WITH ELECTRONIC MONITORING REQUIREMENT/CONTD: TO SET AND TO JOIN 18011749/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:DEFENSE ORAL PC991 MOTION IS DENIED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NGPLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/987,2/ORMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT MAYBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/CONTD:PROOF OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/DOP/
/CAL:PTC & TRAILING FELONY #18011749 (OPEN MISD)/MO138572:18011749 & 19001609/CTORD:EM TO BE REMOVED/
